name: HMS ML 239 (ML 239)
events: 9 Jul 1943 HMS Untiring (Lt. R. Boyd, DSC, RN) shifted from Holy Loch to Larne. She was escorted by HMS ML 239 (T/Lt. O.H.W. Richards, RNVR). (1)
21 Jul 1943 HMS Tantalus (Lt.Cdr. H.S. Mackenzie, DSO and Bar, RN) shifted from Holy Loch to Larne. She was escorted by HMS ML 239 (T/Lt. O.H.W. Richards, RNVR). (2)
26 Mar 1944 HMS Trenchant (Lt.Cdr. A.R. Hezlet, DSC, RN) shifted from the Campbeltown area to Larne escorted by HMS ML 239 (T/Lt. O.H.W. Richards, RNVR). (3)
27 Jun 1944 HMS Upshot (Lt. H.W. Wilkinson, RN) shifted from Campbeltown to Larne. She was escorted by HMS ML 239 (T/Lt. O.H.W. Richards, RNVR). (4)
11 Nov 1944 At 0800 A/11, HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) departed Larne for Rothesay where she arrived at 1700 A/11.
From 0900 A/11 to shortly before noon, she was escorted by HMS ML 239 (T/Lt. O.H.W. Richards, RNVR). (5)

11 Nov 1944 Around 0800 A/11, HMS Uproar (Lt. J.N. Devlin, DSC, RN) departed Rothesay for Larne where she arrived around 1510 A/11. She was escorted from shortly before noon by HMS ML 239 (T/Lt. O.H.W. Richards, RNVR). (6)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
